title: MemoryRecord
description: A single record in the Shay memory fabric. Supports 4-tier recall hierarchy (T0/T1/T2/T3) with optional embeddings and entity extraction.

id.description: Unique identifier for this record (UUID v4 or similar)

content.description: The text/data payload of the memory

tier.description: Recall tier: T0=always-in-context, T1=session-active, T2=recalled-on-demand, T3=archived

importance.description: Numerical importance score (interpretation up to consumer, typically 0-1 or 0-100)

validityStart.description: ISO 8601 timestamp when this record became valid

validityEnd.description: Optional ISO 8601 timestamp after which this record is no longer authoritative

embedding.description: Optional vector representation of the content for semantic search (e.g., 384D or 768D embeddings)

entities.description: Optional array of extracted entities or tags (e.g. ['task-123', 'feature-brainstorm'])
